2372930.name: BLOODMIST
2372930.description:
Bloodmist

A remote settlement, long abandoned, is swallowed by an unnatural red mist.

Locals whisper of a curse — those who enter never return, and their screams echo in the fog long after they vanish.

Something moves within the Bloodmist.

Something that hungers.

You and your team have been sent to cleanse the area… but the mist is alive, twisting your senses and drawing you toward things that should not exist. As the ritual begins, you realize the true horror: the mist is spreading.

Ritual Gameplay

Find cursed relics scattered across the map. Bring them to the altar while avoiding the creature stalking you.

Survive Together — or Die Alone

Co-op Game. Split up to cover more ground, or stay close to share your limited light sources.

GAMEPLAY

Gather and cleanse cursed items.

Avoid the creature — once it sees you, run.

Survive the Bloodmist… if you can.
2372930.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
